message:
Add peer address tracking to HTTP/1.1 request handling

Thread the remote peer SocketAddr through the HTTP/1.1 stack:
- types.rs: add peer_addr: Option<SocketAddr> field to Request struct
- server.rs: add serve_with_peer_addr() method that attaches peer address
  to each parsed request; existing serve() delegates with None
- listener.rs: extract peer_addr from TcpStream before spawning handler,
  pass through serve_with_peer_addr
- codec.rs: initialize peer_addr as None in all decoder paths
- client.rs, http_client.rs: set peer_addr: None in request construction
- tests: add peer_addr: None to all test request literals

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
